name: Snails Sommeroise/ Escargots a La Sommeroise
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 3 hours. Cooking time: 2 1/2 hours.
1. Starve the snails for at least 8 days, then wash them in several changes of water until clean.
2. Rinse with vinegar and drain.
3. Place the snails in a saucepan of boiling water with the thyme, bay leaf, basil, orange peel, and pork rind.
4. When the snails are almost cooked, remove them from their shells using boiling water (boiling makes it easier).
5. Brown the snails in olive oil with the fatty bacon, walnuts, anchovy fillets, crushed garlic, salt, and pepper.
6. Thicken the mixture with flour.
7. Serve on a bed of spinach that has been washed to remove grit.
Wines: Tavel, Chusclan, Coteaux d'Aix-en-Provence.
From "Larousse Traditional French Cooking."
